filtered_articles.title: New Nintendo Switch 2 Blue and Light Yellow Joy-Con 2 Are Available To Preorder
filtered_articles.description: A new pair of Joy-Con 2 in blue and light yellow are set to be released on July 23. If you want them for your Nintendo Switch 2, we've broken down where you can preorder them right now ahead of their release.
